title: Choppy Market Trader for Beginners: Hi-tech Stocks (TA&FA)
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Introducing the ultimate trading tool for novice traders - our specially designed robot that trades stocks of high-tech companies. With just 5 to 10 trades per week, and an average holding period of 1-3 days, you can effortlessly follow its signals without spending too much time.

Our team of quants paid special attention to ensuring the stability of our trading robot during periods of choppy markets, which often pose significant challenges for inexperienced traders. Using a unique multi-level system of backtesting and forward testing, we were able to create algorithms that are not susceptible to the effects of instability, as demonstrated by the robot's trading results during the December 2021 period.

Our robot's algorithm is based on a unique mechanism that uses complex models to analyze changes in price dynamics and volatility to identify trend reversal points. When several models generate a signal in one direction, the robot opens a trade, allowing you to capture profitable signals even on a small number of stocks.

For long positions, a fixed stop loss and take profit are set at 3% of the opening price of the trade. For short positions, a trailing stop loss is set based on a patented combination of technical indicators, with a fixed take profit of 3.5% of the opening price of the trade. With this cautious approach, you can efficiently generate profitable signals without taking on excessive risk.

https://preview.redd.it/ko2q97itw4nc1.png?width=1225&format=png&auto=webp&s=e5bb3f4b813fd87c4f796de773f0888457074d0e

High-tech companies such as "Apple", "Microsoft", and "Intel" have become key drivers of economic growth and financial markets in recent years, constantly creating new products and developing new technologies that change consumer tastes and lifestyles. With our robot, you can easily access and trade these exciting opportunities.

Our robot's trading results are shown without using a margin, and you can view the full trading statistics and equity chart by clicking on the "[show more](https://tickeron.com/bot-trading/321-Choppy-Market-Trader-for-Beginners-Hi-tech-Stocks-TA-FA?via=7554321)" button on the robot page. In the "Open Trades" tab, you can see how the AI robot selects equities, enters, and exits in paper trades, while the "Closed Trades" tab allows you to review all previous trades made by the robot.

**Disclaimer.** The presented paper traded results (annualized returns, % wins/loss, and other statistics) are achieved by the application of the backtested and forward tested models. The past backtested and forward tested performance should not be taken as an indication or guarantee of future performance, and no representation or warranty, expressed or implied is made regarding future performance. Forward testing started on 05.01.2023.
